description: Address review issues: restore gameplay information (force totals, owner labels, monster name tooltips), add FortressIcon fallback, add comment about monster image fallback, and add responsive media query for smaller screens.
steps: Import FortressIcon and add it as fallback when getCastleImage returns null for fortress figures
Restore gameplay info: add force totals per owner, owner clan labels/badges, and hover tooltips with monster name and effect on monster figures
Add a comment in figureImages.ts explaining fallback behavior for monsters without images
Add responsive media query in App.css for the diorama modal on smaller screens
acceptance_criteria: FortressIcon renders when getCastleImage returns null
Monster figures show tooltip with name and effect on hover
Each figure shows its owner clan label/badge
Force totals per player are visible in the modal
A comment explains the image fallback behavior in figureImages.ts
Responsive media query adjusts diorama for screens under 768px
npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
findings: All four review issues resolved. FortressIcon import re-added as fallback. Force totals use calculateForce from gameLogic.ts. Monster tooltips use card data from SPRING_CARDS/SUMMER_CARDS/AUTUMN_CARDS. Responsive media query targets max-width 768px. Vite build passes cleanly.
